heroDescription: Explore Wan video generation models on Novita AI for text-to-video, image-to-video, and production video generation workflows.
seoDescription: Explore Wan AI models on Novita AI. Compare Wan text-to-video and image-to-video model pages, API access, and structured CMS content for production workflows.
overviewBody: Wan is a video generation model family used for creating video clips from text prompts and source images. It is useful for creative generation, concept previews, advertising assets, and short-form production workflows.

This Novita AI collection page groups Wan variants into one SEO-friendly hub. Each model card links to an individual model page so developers can inspect API examples, pricing signals, and playground behavior before integration.
Use the collection to compare Wan versions and generation modes without depending on the full model library view.

capabilities.title: Text-to-video generation
capabilities.description: Create video clips directly from prompts for creative drafts, social assets, and visual exploration.

capabilities.title: Image-to-video generation
capabilities.description: Animate source images and iterate on visual motion while preserving a reference frame or subject.

capabilities.title: Versioned Wan lineup
capabilities.description: Organize Wan 2.x models by version and generation mode so users can find the right model page quickly.

capabilities.title: Model API access
capabilities.description: Use dedicated model pages to move from collection discovery into API examples and playground testing.

lineupSections.title: Wan 2.x Series
lineupSections.description: Wan 2.x variants cover the main Wan text-to-video and image-to-video workflows available through Novita AI model pages.
items: Use Wan 2.6 for the newest Wan generation workflows represented in the CMS data.
Use Wan 2.5 and 2.2 variants to compare earlier behavior or support existing prompts and integrations.
Open each model page to confirm current API parameters, pricing, and playground availability.

whyNovitaTitle: Why run Wan on Novita AI

whyNovitaItems.title: Unified model access
whyNovitaItems.description: Use Wan models through the same Novita AI model API surface as other generation families.

whyNovitaItems.title: Dedicated model pages
whyNovitaItems.description: Each Wan variant links to a model page with examples, pricing, and Playground access.

whyNovitaItems.title: Config-backed model cards
whyNovitaItems.description: Collection cards are generated from enabled Novita AI model configuration and pricing data.

faq.question: What Wan models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The collection page lists enabled Wan variants from Novita AI model configuration and links each model to its dedicated model page.

faq.question: Can I compare Wan model pricing?
faq.answer: Yes. Model cards surface pricing from Novita AI product configuration when pricing is available.

guidanceLinks.label: Model APIs overview
guidanceLinks.description: Start with the Novita AI model API guide.
